story: Outside the Seattle embassy, a Vreesek child lies dead, teal blood in the rain, clutching a silvery icon. The iVress orders Detective Jessica Cho: find truth, return the shokrah, restore peace. The mother says the boy was disobedient; he stole the shokrah; the iVress wanted him gone. On the balcony Jessica saw smudges and gray scales. Morning: the coroner hands Jessica the silvery “toy”—it is the shokrah; Jessica now has it. Back at the embassy the rail is scrubbed; a guard says only the iVress’s family uses the room. “Bring me the mother,” Jessica says, and the mother is shown in.
question: When Jessica summons the Vreesek mother back into the room, what will the mother most likely do?
answer_with_knowledge: Immediately ask Jessica to return the shokrah to her
answer_without_knowledge: Ask if Jessica has any news
